name: LM Studio
description: Registers a local LM Studio OpenAI-compatible server as a first-party chat provider using configured model IDs.

env.description: Optional fallback loopback LM Studio OpenAI-compatible base URL. Defaults to http://localhost:1234/v1.
Optional fallback bearer token for LM Studio or a protected local proxy when no api_key Plugin Setting is configured.
Alternate optional fallback bearer token for LM Studio or a protected local proxy.
Optional comma-separated LM Studio model IDs exposed by the local server when no model_ids Plugin Setting is configured.

settings.label: LM Studio base URL
settings.description: Loopback OpenAI-compatible base URL for LM Studio. Defaults to http://localhost:1234/v1 and is restricted by the plugin to localhost, 127.0.0.1, or ::1 /v1 URLs.

settings.label: LM Studio API token
settings.description: Optional bearer token for LM Studio or a protected local proxy. Falls back to LM_API_TOKEN or LMSTUDIO_API_KEY.

settings.label: LM Studio model IDs
settings.description: Model IDs to expose for the local LM Studio server. Use IDs returned by LM Studio /v1/models. Falls back to comma-separated LMSTUDIO_MODEL_IDS.

providers.name: LM Studio
providers.description: Registers configured local LM Studio OpenAI-compatible chat models and serves them through Pi's OpenAI-compatible transport.
